homepage.heroHeadline: Building Wichita, One Project at a Time
homepage.heroSubline: Jbc Construction: Trusted Wichita general contractor. Quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and community commitment.
aboutText: Jbc Construction started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable construction services to our neighbors in Wichita and the surrounding areas. Founded by local Wichita residents, we understand the unique needs of homeowners in our community, from dealing with Kansas' unpredictable weather to preserving the charm of our established neighborhoods like College Hill and Riverside.

We believe in a collaborative approach, working closely with you every step of the way to ensure your vision becomes a reality. Our values are rooted in integrity, transparency, and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. We prioritize clear communication and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring a smooth and stress-free construction experience.

Jbc Construction is more than just a construction company; we're a part of the Wichita community. We're proud to support local businesses and organizations, and we're dedicated to contributing to the growth and prosperity of our city. We treat every project as if it were our own, ensuring lasting quality and satisfaction.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Wichita's climate, building codes, and neighborhood characteristics.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Experienced team dedicated to delivering exceptional workmanship.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: On-time project completion and responsive communication throughout the process.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Jbc Construction for a free consultation and let's discuss your project.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Wichita home with Jbc Construction.
services.description:
A kitchen remodel is one of the best investments you can make in your home. Jbc Construction specializes in creating kitchens that are both beautiful and functional, tailored to your specific needs and lifestyle. Whether you're dreaming of a modern, open-concept design or a cozy, traditional space, we can bring your vision to life.

Our kitchen remodeling services include everything from design and planning to demolition, construction, and finishing touches. We handle all aspects of the project, including cabinetry, countertops, flooring, lighting, and appliance installation. We work with a wide range of materials and styles to match your taste and budget. We carefully consider the unique aspects of Wichita homes, such as existing plumbing and electrical systems, and ensure all work is up to code.

We understand that a kitchen remodel can be disruptive, which is why we strive to minimize the inconvenience and maintain a clean and safe work environment. Our team is committed to completing your project on time and within budget, with minimal disruption to your daily life. From initial consultation to final walk-through, we'll be there to guide you through every step of the process.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We'll discuss your vision, budget, and timeline.
Step 2: Planning and Permitting – We'll create detailed plans and obtain all necessary permits.
Step 3: Demolition and Construction – We'll carefully remove existing fixtures and begin construction.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We'll install new appliances, countertops, and fixtures, ensuring everything is perfect.

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically ranges from 4 to 8 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: While it's not always necessary, it's often more convenient to move out during the demolition and construction phases.

faq.question: How much does a kitchen remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a kitchen remodel depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials used. We provide detailed estimates upfront to avoid surprises.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create your dream bathroom with Jbc Construction's expert remodeling services in Wichita.
services.description:
Your bathroom should be a relaxing and functional space that meets your needs. Jbc Construction specializes in transforming outdated bathrooms into luxurious retreats. Whether you're looking to update fixtures, expand the space, or create a spa-like atmosphere, we can help.

Our bathroom remodeling services include everything from design and planning to demolition, construction, and finishing touches. We handle all aspects of the project, including plumbing, electrical work, tiling, and fixture installation. We're experienced in working with a variety of materials, from classic ceramic tile to modern stone and glass. We understand the specific challenges of bathroom remodeling in Wichita homes, such as dealing with older plumbing systems and ensuring proper ventilation to combat humidity.

We're committed to providing exceptional workmanship and customer service. We'll work closely with you to create a bathroom that reflects your personal style and meets your functional needs. We'll also ensure that the project is completed on time and within budget, with minimal disruption to your daily life.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your vision and budget.
Step 2: Planning and Permitting – Develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Demolition and Construction – Carefully remove existing fixtures and begin construction.
Step 4: Fixture Installation – Install new plumbing, lighting, and bathroom fixtures.

faq.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take?
faq.answer: A typical bathroom remodel takes between 2 to 4 weeks, depending on the scope of the project.

faq.question: Do I need to obtain permits for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: In most cases, permits are required for plumbing and electrical work. We'll handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right fixtures and materials?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide guidance and recommendations based on your style preferences and budget.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Unlock the full potential of your Wichita home with Jbc Construction's basement finishing services.
services.description:
A finished basement can add valuable living space to your Wichita home, increasing its value and providing a comfortable area for your family to enjoy. Jbc Construction specializes in transforming unfinished basements into functional and beautiful spaces.

Our basement finishing services include everything from framing and insulation to electrical work, plumbing, and flooring. We can create a variety of spaces, including home theaters, game rooms, home offices, and extra bedrooms. We're experienced in dealing with the unique challenges of basement finishing in Wichita homes, such as moisture control and foundation issues. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a dry, comfortable, and energy-efficient space.

We're committed to providing exceptional workmanship and customer service. We'll work closely with you to design a basement that meets your specific needs and budget. We'll also ensure that the project is completed on time and within budget, with minimal disruption to your daily life. Considering Wichita's tendency for severe weather, we can also incorporate storm shelters into the design.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your goals and budget.
Step 2: Planning and Permitting – Develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Framing and Insulation – Build the structure and insulate for comfort and energy efficiency.
Step 4: Electrical and Plumbing – Install wiring and plumbing for lighting, outlets, and fixtures.

faq.question: How long does it take to finish a basement?
faq.answer: The duration of a basement finishing project depends on the size and complexity of the space, but typically ranges from 6 to 12 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need to worry about moisture in my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, moisture control is essential in basements. We'll take steps to ensure your finished basement is dry and comfortable.

faq.question: Can you incorporate a bathroom or wet bar into my finished basement?
faq.answer: Yes, we can incorporate bathrooms, wet bars, and other custom features into your finished basement.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom deck or patio from Jbc Construction in Wichita.
services.description:
Enjoy the beautiful Kansas weather with a custom deck or patio from Jbc Construction. We specialize in designing and building outdoor living spaces that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

Our deck and patio construction services include everything from design and planning to construction and finishing touches. We work with a variety of materials, including wood, composite decking, pavers, and concrete. We can create a variety of designs, from simple decks and patios to elaborate outdoor kitchens and entertainment areas. We consider the specific challenges of outdoor construction in Wichita, such as dealing with extreme temperatures and ensuring proper drainage.

We're committed to providing exceptional workmanship and customer service. We'll work closely with you to create an outdoor living space that meets your needs and budget. We'll also ensure that the project is completed on time and within budget, with minimal disruption to your daily life. We know how intense the summer heat can be, so we can also incorporate shade structures into the design.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your vision and budget.
Step 2: Planning and Permitting – Develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Site Preparation – Prepare the site for construction.
Step 4: Construction and Finishing – Build the deck or patio and add finishing touches.

faq.question: What type of materials should I use for my deck or patio?
faq.answer: The best materials depend on your budget, style preferences, and maintenance requirements. We can provide recommendations based on your needs.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a deck or patio?
faq.answer: In most cases, permits are required for deck and patio construction. We'll handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: The duration of the project depends on the size and complexity of the design, but typically ranges from 1 to 3 weeks.

services.name: Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your Wichita home with Jbc Construction's reliable roofing services.
services.description:
Your roof is your home's first line of defense against the elements. Jbc Construction provides comprehensive roofing services to protect your home from the harsh Kansas weather. Whether you need a new roof installation, roof repair, or roof maintenance, we can help.

Our roofing services include everything from roof inspections and estimates to roof replacement and repair. We work with a variety of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and tile roofing. We're experienced in dealing with the specific challenges of roofing in Wichita, such as hail damage, wind damage, and extreme temperature fluctuations. We ensure that all work is up to code and meets the highest standards of quality.

We're committed to providing exceptional workmanship and customer service. We'll work closely with you to assess your roofing needs and provide the best possible solution. We'll also ensure that the project is completed on time and within budget, with minimal disruption to your daily life.
process: Step 1: Roof Inspection – Assess the condition of your roof.
Step 2: Estimate and Planning – Provide a detailed estimate and plan for the project.
Step 3: Roof Replacement or Repair – Replace or repair damaged roofing materials.
Step 4: Clean Up and Inspection – Clean up the site and inspect the finished roof.

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: It's recommended to have your roof inspected at least once a year, and after any major weather event.

faq.question: How long does a new roof last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a roof depends on the materials used, but typically ranges from 20 to 50 years.

faq.question: What are the signs that I need a new roof?
faq.answer: Signs include missing or damaged shingles, leaks, and excessive granule loss.

services.name: Siding Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal and protection with Jbc Construction's siding services in Wichita.
services.description:
New or repaired siding can dramatically improve the look and value of your home while protecting it from the elements. Jbc Construction offers expert siding installation and repair services in Wichita and surrounding areas.

We work with a variety of siding materials, including vinyl, wood, fiber cement, and metal, to match your home's style and budget. Our services include removing old siding, installing new siding, repairing damaged siding, and ensuring proper weather sealing. We understand the challenges posed by Wichita's climate, including extreme temperature changes, strong winds, and occasional hail storms, and we use durable, weather-resistant materials to protect your home for years to come.

We are committed to providing quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. We will work closely with you to choose the right siding for your home and ensure a seamless installation process. We understand that having work done on your home can be disruptive, so we strive to minimize the inconvenience and complete the project on time and within budget.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Siding Selection – We will discuss your needs and help you choose the right siding.
Step 2: Removal of Old Siding – We will carefully remove your old siding and dispose of it properly.
Step 3: Installation of New Siding – We will install your new siding with precision and attention to detail.
Step 4: Inspection and Cleanup – We will inspect the finished product and clean up the job site.

faq.question: What are the benefits of new siding?
faq.answer: New siding can increase your home's value, improve its curb appeal, protect it from the elements, and reduce energy costs.

faq.question: How long does siding installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of siding installation depends on the size of your home and the type of siding, but typically ranges from one to two weeks.

faq.question: How do I choose the right siding for my home?
faq.answer: We can help you choose the right siding based on your budget, style preferences, and the climate in Wichita.

serviceAreas.content:
Jbc Construction is proud to serve the vibrant city of Wichita, Kansas. As a leading general contractor, we bring expertise and dedication to every project, whether it's a residential renovation, a commercial build-out, or a custom home construction. We understand the unique architectural styles and building codes of Wichita and are committed to delivering exceptional results that exceed our clients' expectations.

From the historic districts to the growing suburbs, Jbc Construction is equipped to handle projects of any size and complexity. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and skilled craftsmanship to ensure a seamless and stress-free construction experience. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted partner for homeowners and businesses throughout Wichita.
serviceAreas.localContext: Wichita, known as the "Air Capital of the World," boasts a rich history and a thriving arts and culture scene. The city's diverse neighborhoods and strong sense of community make it a wonderful place to live and work.

serviceAreas.content:
Jbc Construction extends its exceptional general contracting services to the growing community of Andover, Kansas. We understand the unique needs of homeowners and businesses in Andover and are dedicated to providing top-quality construction solutions tailored to their specific requirements. Whether you're looking to remodel your kitchen, build a new home, or expand your commercial space, we have the expertise and experience to bring your vision to life.

Our team at Jbc Construction is committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship, attention to detail, and outstanding customer service. We pride ourselves on our ability to manage projects efficiently and effectively, ensuring that they are completed on time and within budget. We are proud to be a part of the Andover community and are committed to helping our clients create spaces that they will love for years to come.
serviceAreas.localContext: Andover is a thriving suburban community known for its excellent schools, beautiful parks, and family-friendly atmosphere. The city's strong sense of community and convenient location make it a desirable place to live.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Jbc Construction did an amazing job on our kitchen remodel! They listened to our ideas and helped us create a beautiful and functional space. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Jbc Construction to finish our basement, and we're very happy with the results. They transformed a dark, unfinished space into a comfortable and inviting living area. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they were quick to address them. Overall, a great experience.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Jbc Construction completely transformed our outdated bathroom into a modern oasis. The quality of their work is exceptional, and their attention to detail is impressive. They were also very respectful of our home and kept the work area clean.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We love our new deck built by Jbc Construction! It's the perfect space for entertaining and relaxing. The team was professional, efficient, and always willing to answer our questions. We highly recommend them for any outdoor construction projects.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Jbc Construction repaired our roof after a recent hailstorm. They were quick to respond and provided a fair estimate. The repair work was done efficiently and effectively. We appreciate their prompt and reliable service.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: We recently had new siding installed by Jbc Construction, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The new siding looks great and has significantly improved our home's curb appeal. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they completed the project on time and within budget.
